nasb.text: Babylon has been a golden cup in the hand of the Lord, Intoxicating all the earth. The nations have drunk of her wine; Therefore the nations are going mad.

esv.text: Babylon was a golden cup in the Lord’s hand, making all the earth drunken; the nations drank of her wine; therefore the nations went mad.

cnv.text: 巴比倫曾是耶和華手中的金杯， 使全地都喝醉； 列國喝了它的酒， 就都瘋狂亂性。

ccb.text: 巴比伦在耶和华手中曾是灌醉天下的金杯， 列国喝了她的酒都变得癫狂。
